decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to create a powerful combo using Coveted Jewel and various artifacts like Tinker, Time Vault, and The One Ring. The deck aims to generate significant card advantage, mana acceleration, and control through cards like Paradoxical Outcome, Tezzeret, and Karn, the Great Creator. It utilizes powerful artifacts and spells to ensure victory by disrupting the opponent's game plan and overwhelming them with a strong board presence. The inclusion of cards like Force of Will and Chalice of the Void provides additional protection and disruption against opposing strategies.

The deck focuses on using powerful control spells like Force of Will, Spell Pierce, and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt the opponent's game plan while also utilizing cards like Lavinia, Azorius Renegade and Wasteland to further control the board. The inclusion of powerful draw spells like Ancestral Recall, Dig Through Time, and Treasure Cruise helps the player maintain card advantage and find the necessary pieces to control the game. With a strong mana base and access to disruptive creatures like Psychic Frog and Orcish Bowmasters, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent to secure victory.

The deck focuses on using artifacts to quickly ramp up mana and deploy powerful threats, while disrupting the opponent's game plan through cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere. The key strategy is to rapidly assemble a board state that overwhelms the opponent with efficient creatures and powerful artifacts, such as The One Ring and Mystic Forge. By utilizing cards like Mishra's Workshop and Ancient Tomb, the deck aims to establish early dominance and pressure the opponent into submission before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on using artifacts to generate quick mana and control the board with disruptive creatures like Lodestone Golem and Glaring Fleshraker. It also includes powerful artifact-based cards like Tezzeret, Cruel Captain and Mystic Forge to out-value opponents. The inclusion of cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere helps to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while cards like Manifold Key and Inventors' Fair provide utility and card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of efficient aggression and disruptive elements.

The deck revolves around generating mana quickly and efficiently using artifact mana accelerators like Grim Monolith and Mishra's Workshop to fuel powerful combo pieces such as Coveted Jewel, Paradoxical Outcome, and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain. By chaining together artifacts and spells, the deck aims to draw cards, generate mana, and ultimately win the game through a mixture of card advantage, board presence, and tempo control. The inclusion of powerful Vintage restricted cards like Ancestral Recall and Time Walk further amplifies the deck's potential for explosive plays and game-winning combos.

The deck focuses on assembling the Doomsday combo as quickly as possible using cards like Dark Ritual, Demonic Tutor, and Doomsday itself. The goal is to set up a winning pile of cards with Thassa's Oracle to win the game on the following turn. The deck includes various control elements like Force of Will and Flusterstorm to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Gitaxian Probe and Street Wraith help to dig through the deck and find the necessary pieces to execute the combo efficiently.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Dredge ability of cards to quickly fill the graveyard with creatures and trigger powerful effects. By using cards like Stinkweed Imp, Golgari Thug, and Golgari Grave-Troll, along with Bazaar of Baghdad and Serum Powder to quickly mill cards, the deck aims to bring back creatures like Ichorid and Prized Amalgam from the graveyard to overwhelm the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes disruption cards like Force of Will and Mindbreak Trap to protect the combo and disrupt the opponent's strategy.

The focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of powerful spells and disruptive interactions. Using cards like Force of Will, Mana Drain, and Mindbreak Trap, the deck aims to counter or remove any threats from the opponent. The inclusion of Gifts Ungiven allows for versatile and strategic card selection, while cards like Underworld Breach and Brain Freeze provide win conditions. By utilizing Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion, the deck gains additional value and resilience. Ultimately, the deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory through careful resource management and tactical decision-making.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively disrupt the opponent's strategy by using cards like Grief and Collector Ouphe, while also quickly putting pressure on them with aggressive creatures like Barrowgoyf and Witherbloom Apprentice. The deck also utilizes graveyard recursion with cards like Reanimate and Deathrite Shaman. Additionally, the deck includes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to further disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, this deck aims to control the game early on and apply pressure to successfully win the match.

This Esper Control deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy and controlling the game through counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. It includes powerful cards like Ancestral Recall, Black Lotus, and Time Walk, along with disruptive creatures like Psychic Frog and Lavinia, Azorius Renegade. The deck aims to win by outlasting the opponent, gradually gaining incremental advantages, and eventually overwhelming them with powerful spells and threats. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to control the game through disruption, card advantage, and incremental advantage.

The deck focuses on using artifacts and powerful combo pieces to generate massive amounts of mana and card advantage in order to control the game and win through the extra turns provided by Time Vault. It also utilizes Mishra's Workshop to help accelerate its game plan, along with various other powerful artifacts like Urza's Saga and Moxen. The deck can also disrupt opponents with cards like Sink into Stupor and Force of Will while setting up its win condition with cards like Coveted Jewel and Paradoxical Outcome.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying powerful artifacts like The One Ring and Grim Monolith to power out aggressive creatures like Glaring Fleshraker and Scrawling Crawler. It also utilizes cards like Manifold Key and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain to untap artifacts for extra value. With disruptive cards like Chalice of the Void and Trinisphere to control the game, along with the ability to tutor for key pieces with cards like Inventors' Fair and Karn, the Great Creator, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its artifact synergy and powerful threats.

This deck focuses on utilizing Paradoxical Outcome to return multiple artifacts to hand, generating card advantage and mana in the process. By combining powerful artifacts like Black Lotus, Moxen, and Mana Crypt with cards like Tezzeret, the Great Creator and Time Vault, the deck aims to assemble game-winning combos quickly. The inclusion of powerful blue spells like Force of Will and Misdirection provide protection and disruption, while supplementary cards like Narset, Parter of Veils and Tinker offer additional utility and versatility. The deck's goal is to establish a dominant board presence and overwhelm opponents with its powerful artifact synergies.

The deck focuses on using disruptive spells and removal to control the game while also utilizing powerful card draw effects and counterspells to outvalue the opponent. It aims to protect its key creatures and permanents while efficiently trading resources with the opponent. It also includes ways to recycle key cards from the graveyard and tutor for specific answers. The deck is designed to maintain board control and disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up for game-winning plays through card advantage and efficient threat management.

The deck focuses on utilizing control elements such as counter spells and removal to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It also incorporates cards like Gifts Ungiven and Dig Through Time to tutor for key pieces and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of Lurrus of the Dream-Den as a companion allows for additional recursion and card advantage. The deck aims to control the game tempo, generate card advantage, and ultimately win through a combination of board control and resource management.

The deck focuses on utilizing powerful control elements such as Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage through cards like Dig Through Time and Ancestral Recall. Lurrus of the Dream-Den provides additional value by allowing the player to recast key cards from the graveyard. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Lavinia, Azorius Renegade and Wasteland to further disrupt the opponent's strategy, ultimately aiming to control the game until victory is achieved.
